text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm taking a breather<n>at the park...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The trick to running fast... The trick...<n>I've never
really tried using any tricks<n>while running,
though...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I come across Silence Suzuka<n>wandering around
in a left-handed<n>loop, absorbed in her thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I-I'm so sorry for blocking your...<n>Wait, where
am I?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh... It's one thing to get lost in<n>my
thoughts, but I can't believe I've<n>lost my way
and wandered so far out<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And what's more, I have nothing to<n>show for it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: Why not do some partner running with her?

Maybe the trick is hidden in that left-handed loop
you're in.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If I can't tell her what she shoulddo, I can simply show her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for the advice. I'll<n>try asking
her to run with me right<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The trick is in my left-handed<n>loop?
R-really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That thought has never even occurred<n>to me, but
I suppose I do always end<n>up doing this...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll tell her about this. I just<n>hope it helps
her.
